g.text: File Serving Code Path: open() → fstat() → send() Loop (512KB PNG)
open() | 1x | ~1-5 µs | Returns file_fd; hits dcache
fstat() | 1x | ~0.5 µs | Reads inode from icache
read() | 8x | ~5 µs ea | 64KB chunks from page cache
send() | 8x | ~2 µs ea | 64KB into socket send buf
Total body data: 524288 bytes | 8 read+send iterations

text.tspan: // MANDATORY: every open() must have a close().
// MANDATORY: every open() must have a close().
(avoids heap fragmentation; fits in L2 cache)

Iter 3 | read() → 65536 B | send() → 65536 B | offset 0x20000
Iter 4 | read() → 65536 B | send() → 65536 B | offset 0x30000
Iter 5 | read() → 65536 B | send() → 65536 B | offset 0x40000
Iter 6 | read() → 65536 B | send() → 65536 B | offset 0x50000
Iter 7 | read() → 65536 B | send() → 65536 B | offset 0x60000
Iter 8 | read() → 65536 B | send() → 65536 B | offset 0x70000
Iter 9 | read() → 0 (EOF) | loop exits | total 524288 B
